plan.failureSummary: The test assertion failed because the actual URL included a fragment (#playwright-check-suite) which was not present in the expected URL string. The AI correctly selected the search result 'Constructs > DETECT' for the query 'Playwright check suite', but that specific result links directly to a section of the page via a fragment.
observedIndicators: Assertion mismatch detected in error details.
page.ai tool calls succeeded but the following Playwright assertion failed.
The clicked search result contained a URL fragment (#playwright-check-suite).

remediationSteps.summary: Relax or update the URL assertion to account for URL fragments.
remediationSteps.details: Update the assertion on line 13 of checkly.test.ts to either expect the URL with the fragment 'https://www.checklyhq.com/docs/constructs/playwright-check/#playwright-check-suite' or use a more flexible matcher like .toContain().

plan.notes: The AI performed the search and selection correctly. The failure is purely in the test's deterministic assertion logic which is too rigid regarding the URL structure.
